sources.expression: $wpdb->get_var($wpdb->prepare("SELECT user_id FROM " . $wpdb->wpcatcha_accesslocks . " WHERE release_date > %s AND accesslock_IP = %s AND unlocked = 0", array(current_time('mysql'), $ip)))
$wpdb->get_results("SELECT COUNT(*) as count,DATE_FORMAT(accesslock_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date FROM " . $wpdb->wpcatcha_accesslocks . " GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(accesslock_date, '%Y%m%d')")
$wpdb->get_results("SELECT COUNT(*) as count,DATE_FORMAT(login_attempt_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date FROM " . $wpdb->wpcatcha_login_fails . " GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(login_attempt_date, '%Y%m%d')")

sanitizers.expression:
$wpdb->prepare(
                "SELECT COUNT(login_attempt_ID) FROM " . $wpdb->wpcatcha_login_fails . " WHERE login_attempt_date + INTERVAL %d MINUTE > %s AND login_attempt_IP = %s",
                array($options['retries_within'], current_time('mysql'), $ip)
            )
$wpdb->prepare("SELECT user_id FROM " . $wpdb->wpcatcha_accesslocks . " WHERE release_date > %s AND accesslock_IP = %s AND unlocked = 0", array(current_time('mysql'), $ip))
